steward_labor_shift.title: Labor shift
steward_labor_shift.dialog: My liege, industrial shortfalls are biting. Permit me to reassign a share of idle hands toward the starving workshops.

steward_role_reshuffle.title: Role reshuffle
steward_role_reshuffle.dialog: The role mix no longer matches the quotas you set. A controlled reform will sting, but inefficiency will sting more.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: Full role reform in one sector

marshal_hardening.title: Hardening drills
marshal_hardening.dialog: We can drill the provinces before the next calamity. It costs little now and softens the blow later.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: Next calamity happiness hit ×0.85 for 28 days

marshal_martial_order.title: Martial order
marshal_martial_order.dialog: A distressed region needs lockdown corridors. Health may stabilize — happiness will not.

chancellor_restoration_levy.title: Restoration levy
chancellor_restoration_levy.dialog: The worst soil and timber stands need a levy for restoration. Yields will dip while the land heals.

chancellor_extraction_surge.title: Extraction surge
chancellor_extraction_surge.dialog: Open the reserves for a short surge. The ledger will smile — the land will not.

vizier_mandate_focus.title: Mandate focus
vizier_mandate_focus.dialog: Your royal mandate still hangs over the year. A focused push can buy progress — if you authorize it.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: National happiness nudge toward the mandate

vizier_public_triumph.title: Public triumph
vizier_public_triumph.dialog: A modest triumph parade would lift spirits and burnish the score — unless the people are already too weary to cheer.

approve.label: Approve
approve.hint: +happiness and a small pending score bonus
